system
05The system
One system, two themes.
A single token set drives both Midnight Ember (dark, the shipping default) and Daybreak (light). Semantic colours — heart, sleep, oxygen — stay constant, so your data reads the same in either.
Midnight Ember · dark
Daybreak · light
